# FluxyChat

> Multi-tenant realtime chat on Cloudflare Workers (Durable Objects + D1). MIT self-host + hosted beta.

## Docs index

- [Docs home](https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat/blob/main/docs/README.md)
- [Full LLM bundle](https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat/blob/main/docs/llms-full.txt)
- [SDK README](https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat/blob/main/packages/sdk/README.md)
- [SPEC](https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat/blob/main/SPEC.md)
- [Auth / JWT cookbook](https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat/blob/main/docs/cookbook/auth-jwt.md)
- [Next.js end-to-end](https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat/blob/main/docs/snippets/nextjs-end-to-end.md)
- [Support chat use case](https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat/blob/main/docs/use-cases/support-chat.md)
- [Team chat use case](https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat/blob/main/docs/use-cases/team-chat.md)
- [Assistant room / agents](https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat/blob/main/docs/use-cases/assistant-room.md)

## Product URLs

- Beta: https://fluxychat.com/get-started
- Compare: https://fluxychat.com/compare
- Guides index: https://fluxychat.com/guides
- CF Workers chat guide: https://fluxychat.com/guides/cloudflare-workers-chat
- Durable Objects for chat rooms: https://fluxychat.com/guides/durable-objects-for-chat-rooms
- Vercel without Pusher/Ably: https://fluxychat.com/guides/vercel-realtime-without-pusher
- Reconnect & DO hibernation: https://fluxychat.com/guides/reconnect-durable-objects-hibernation
- Dev.to walkthrough: https://dev.to/fluxychat_sdk_330378fbf56/how-to-build-a-realtime-chat-app-on-cloudflare-workers-without-managing-a-socket-fleet-4hdh
- GitHub: https://github.com/AlessandroFare/fluxychat
- npm SDK: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@fluxy-chat/sdk

## SDK quick reference

```ts
import { FluxyChatClient, useChat } from "@fluxy-chat/sdk";

const client = new FluxyChatClient({ baseUrl, userId, token });
const { messages, sendMessage, connectionState, retryMessage, loadMore } = useChat({
  roomId,
  client,
});
```

- Headless core: `FluxyChatClient`, `FluxyChatRoomConnection` (reconnect/backoff, history replay)
- React: `useChat`, `FluxyRealtimeProvider`
- Per-message delivery: `deliveryStatus` pending | sent | failed, `retryMessage(clientMessageId)`
- Connection UI: `connectionState` with `status`, `lastError`, `retryAttempt`, `nextRetryAt`

## Architecture (one paragraph)

One Room Durable Object per channel handles WebSocket fan-out and ordering; messages persist asynchronously to D1. JWT per project for members; Next.js console for rooms, agents, webhooks, billing. Agents emit `tool_call` / `tool_result` on the same room WebSocket as user messages.
